details.test: Task 1: Create guitar tutorial profile with 2 short YouTube links sorted by duration
Task 2: Pin top most-clicked links and hide low-performing ones
Task 3: Create Podcast Episodes section with newest uploads ordered newest to oldest
Task 4: Apply dark theme with purple accent and two-column layout
Task 5: Create pinned scheduled announcement link in Main Profile
Task 6: Archive low-performing links and hide archive section
Task 7: Create Spanish-only duplicate of Travel Vlogs profile
Task 8: Build Top Playlists section from playlists with 10+ videos
Task 9: Generate medium black-on-white QR code for Conference Landing profile
